deals.title_es: Soporte magnético para teléfono LISEN MagSafe con ventosa ajustable

deals.title: WAVLINK USB C / Thunderbolt to 2.5Gbps Ethernet Adapter w/ 95W PD
deals.title_es: Adaptador WAVLINK USB C / Thunderbolt a Ethernet de 2.5Gbps con PD de 95W
deals.post: Este adaptador WAVLINK te permite conectar tu portátil a una red Ethernet de 2.5Gbps y cargar tu dispositivo simultáneamente gracias a su Power Delivery de 95W. Es perfecto para usuarios que necesitan una conexión a internet rápida y estable, junto con carga eficiente, a través de un solo puerto USB-C o Thunderbolt.
deals.post_en: This WAVLINK adapter allows you to connect your laptop to a 2.5Gbps Ethernet network and charge your device simultaneously thanks to its 95W Power Delivery. It's perfect for users needing a fast, stable internet connection, along with efficient charging, via a single USB-C or Thunderbolt port.

deals.post_en: Keep your home spotless with this versatile and easy-to-handle Fanttik Cruise V11 APEX 4-in-1 cordless handheld vacuum. Its 4-in-1 design and 180° rotatable handle make it perfect for cleaning small spaces, vehicles, or hard-to-reach corners.
